guides.name: Abstract page
guides.description: Front-matter checks for title, author metadata, keywords, and abstract availability.

items.label: Informative title
items.requirement: The manuscript has a clear title that can be used as source-grounded front matter.

items.label: Authors and affiliations
items.requirement: Author names and affiliation metadata are available in the annotated front matter.

items.label: Abstract available
items.requirement: An abstract or summary is identified and available for later checks.

items.label: Keywords
items.requirement: Keywords are available when the manuscript provides a keyword list.

guides.name: IMRaD
guides.description: Core article-structure checks for Introduction, Methods, Results, and Discussion/Conclusion sections.

items.label: Introduction
items.requirement: The manuscript includes an introduction or background section.

items.label: Methods
items.requirement: The manuscript includes a methods, materials, or experimental section.

items.label: Results
items.requirement: The manuscript includes a results or findings section.

items.label: Discussion or conclusion
items.requirement: The manuscript includes a discussion or conclusion section.

items.label: Reference list
items.requirement: Reference-list entries are identified with source anchors.

items.label: Tables and figures
items.requirement: Tables and figures are annotated with source anchors when present.

guides.name: Declarations
guides.description: End-matter checks for ethics, conflicts of interest, funding, data availability, and source-grounded evidence.

items.label: Ethics statement
items.requirement: The manuscript includes an ethics approval, consent, or institutional review statement when relevant.

items.label: Conflicts of interest
items.requirement: The manuscript includes a competing interests or conflicts of interest statement.

items.label: Funding
items.requirement: The manuscript includes funding, sponsor, or support information.

items.label: Data availability
items.requirement: The manuscript includes a data availability or materials availability statement when relevant.

items.label: Source quotes
items.requirement: Source-grounded quote anchors are available for jump links.
